message.content:
{
  "page_type": "parameter_table",
  "summary": "This page presents comparative performance data for a Mitsubishi Heavy Industries high-temperature water source heat pump versus two boiler types (A-heavy oil and city gas 13A) under a 100%-80%-60% load operation scenario. It includes two bar charts comparing annual operating costs and annual CO2 emissions, along with detailed explanatory notes.",
  "visual_entities": [
    {"type": "chart", "label": "Annual Cost Comparison Bar Chart (Fig 17-3)"},
    {"type": "chart", "label": "Annual CO2 Emissions Comparison Bar Chart (Fig 17-4)"},
    {"type": "bar", "label": "Boiler (A-heavy oil) Cost Bar"},
    {"type": "bar", "label": "Boiler (City Gas 13A) Cost Bar"},
    {"type": "bar", "label": "Heat Pump Cost Bar"},
    {"type": "bar", "label": "Boiler (A-heavy oil) CO2 Bar"},
    {"type": "bar", "label": "Boiler (City Gas 13A) CO2 Bar"},
    {"type": "bar", "label": "Heat Pump CO2 Bar"},
    {"type": "text", "label": "Explanatory Notes (1-8)"},
    {"type": "header", "label": "Mitsubishi Heavy Industries High-Temperature Water Source Heat Pump"},
    {"type": "footer", "label": "Centrifugal High-Temperature Water Source Heat Pump ETW Technical Data"}
  ],
  "visual_relationships": [
    {"from": "Heat Pump Cost Bar", "relation": "shows approximately 36% down cost compared to", "to": "Boiler (A-heavy oil) Cost Bar"},
    {"from": "Heat Pump Cost Bar", "relation": "shows approximately 60% down cost compared to", "to": "Boiler (City Gas 13A) Cost Bar"},
    {"from": "Heat Pump CO2 Bar", "relation": "shows approximately 73% down emissions compared to", "to": "Boiler (A-heavy oil) CO2 Bar"},
    {"from": "Heat Pump CO2 Bar", "relation": "shows approximately 63% down emissions compared to", "to": "Boiler (City Gas 13A) CO2 Bar"}
  ],
  "useful_for_knowledge_types": ["performance_comparison", "cost_analysis", "emissions_analysis", "energy_efficiency"],
  "ocr_text_if_useful": "图 17-3 年内费用的比较（100%-80%-60%负荷运转）\n年内运转费用（百万日元）\n锅炉（A重油） 8.6\n锅炉（城市煤气13A） 13.8\n热泵 5.5\n约36%down\n约60%down\n图 17-4 年内CO2排放量的比较（100%-80%-60%负荷运转）\n年内CO2排放量（t）\n锅炉（A重油） 466\n锅炉（城市煤气13A） 341\n热泵 126\n约73%down\n约63%down\n注1）100%负荷运转是指年内全部3330小时的100%负荷运转；100%-80%-60%负荷运转是指100%、80%、60%负荷运转分别为1110小时。\n注2）锅炉效率在低位发热量时为95%。\n注3）A重油的低位发热量为36.7MJ/ℓ；城市煤气13A的低位发热量为40.6MJ/m³。\n注4）A重油的CO2排放原单位为2.7kg-CO2/ℓ；城市煤气13A的CO2排放原单位为2.19kg-CO2/m³。\n注5）电力的CO2排放原单位为0.332kg-CO2/kWh。\n注6）电费单价为14.5日元/kWh。\n注7）A重油价格按2009年5月时的全国平均49.8日元/ℓ计算。\n注8）煤气价格按2009年5月以后的东京地区产业用A合同（月固定费用13860日元/月；计量费用79.71日元）计算。",
  "uncertainty_notes": "The page is classified as a parameter_table because it primarily presents quantitative comparative data in chart form, not a standard parameter list. The relationships are derived from the visual annotations (red arrows and percentage labels) on the charts.",
  "confidence": 0.95
}

parsed.summary: This page presents comparative performance data for a Mitsubishi Heavy Industries high-temperature water source heat pump versus two boiler types (A-heavy oil and city gas 13A) under a 100%-80%-60% load operation scenario. It includes two bar charts comparing annual operating costs and annual CO2 emissions, along with detailed explanatory notes.

visual_entities.label: Annual CO2 Emissions Comparison Bar Chart (Fig 17-4)
Mitsubishi Heavy Industries High-Temperature Water Source Heat Pump
Centrifugal High-Temperature Water Source Heat Pump ETW Technical Data

visual_relationships.relation: shows approximately 36% down cost compared to
shows approximately 60% down cost compared to
shows approximately 73% down emissions compared to
shows approximately 63% down emissions compared to

parsed.ocr_text_if_useful:
图 17-3 年内费用的比较（100%-80%-60%负荷运转）
年内运转费用（百万日元）
锅炉（A重油） 8.6
锅炉（城市煤气13A） 13.8
热泵 5.5
约36%down
约60%down
图 17-4 年内CO2排放量的比较（100%-80%-60%负荷运转）
年内CO2排放量（t）
锅炉（A重油） 466
锅炉（城市煤气13A） 341
热泵 126
约73%down
约63%down
注1）100%负荷运转是指年内全部3330小时的100%负荷运转；100%-80%-60%负荷运转是指100%、80%、60%负荷运转分别为1110小时。
注2）锅炉效率在低位发热量时为95%。
注3）A重油的低位发热量为36.7MJ/ℓ；城市煤气13A的低位发热量为40.6MJ/m³。
注4）A重油的CO2排放原单位为2.7kg-CO2/ℓ；城市煤气13A的CO2排放原单位为2.19kg-CO2/m³。
注5）电力的CO2排放原单位为0.332kg-CO2/kWh。
注6）电费单价为14.5日元/kWh。
注7）A重油价格按2009年5月时的全国平均49.8日元/ℓ计算。
注8）煤气价格按2009年5月以后的东京地区产业用A合同（月固定费用13860日元/月；计量费用79.71日元）计算。
parsed.uncertainty_notes: The page is classified as a parameter_table because it primarily presents quantitative comparative data in chart form, not a standard parameter list. The relationships are derived from the visual annotations (red arrows and percentage labels) on the charts.
